chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No.D-6950 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of case For hearing of main case 24.10.2024 Mr. Salman Yousuf, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General, Pakistan ************ Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that purpose of filing of this petition has been served; hence, he does not press the same. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
